scripts.prod: yarn prod:build && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=production node support/prod.mjs
scripts.build: yarn build:main && yarn build:preload && yarn build:renderer
scripts.wails:assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const t='src-wails/assets/tray';fs.mkdirSync(t,{recursive:true});for(const e of ['docker','podman','unified'])for(const m of ['light','dark'])fs.copyFileSync('src/resources/icons/trayIcon-'+m+'-'+e+'.png',t+'/trayIcon-'+m+'-'+e+'.png');console.log('staged tray icons -> src-wails/assets/tray')"
scripts.wails:renderer: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=production vite build --mode=production --config vite.config.renderer.mjs --outDir src-wails/frontend/dist --emptyOutDir && yarn wails:assets
scripts.wails:renderer:mock: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development vite build --mode=development --config vite.config.renderer.mjs --outDir src-wails/frontend/dist --emptyOutDir && yarn wails:assets
scripts.wails:build: yarn wails:renderer && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=production go -C src-wails build -tags production,gtk3 -o bin/container-desktop .
scripts.wails:build:mcp: yarn wails:renderer && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=production go -C src-wails build -tags production,gtk3,mcp -o bin/container-desktop-mcp .
scripts.package:wails:all: yarn wails:renderer && tsx support/cli/lib/wails-package.ts linux_x64 && tsx support/cli/lib/wails-package.ts win_x64 && tsx support/cli/lib/wails-package.ts win_arm64
scripts.package:tauri:mac_arm: yarn tauri:renderer && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node support/tauri-native-bundles.cjs collect --platform mac --arch arm64 --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform mac --arch arm64 --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.package:tauri:win_x64: yarn package:tauri:win_nsis:x64 && yarn package:tauri:win_store:all:x64 && yarn package:tauri:win_zip:x64
scripts.package:tauri:win_arm: yarn package:tauri:win_nsis:arm64 && yarn package:tauri:win_store:all:arm64 && yarn package:tauri:win_zip:arm64
scripts.package:tauri:linux_x86: yarn tauri:renderer && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu && node support/tauri-native-bundles.cjs collect --platform linux --arch x64 --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform linux --arch x64 --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.package:tauri:linux_arm: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu && node support/tauri-native-bundles.cjs collect --platform linux --arch arm64 --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform linux --arch arm64 --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.package:tauri:win_store:appx: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --no-bundle --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-win-store.cjs pack --format appx --arch x64 --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:win_store:appx:arm64: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --no-bundle --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-win-store.cjs pack --format appx --arch arm64 --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:win_store:msix: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --no-bundle --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-win-store.cjs pack --format msix --arch x64 --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:win_store:msix:arm64: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --no-bundle --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-win-store.cjs pack --format msix --arch arm64 --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:win_nsis:x64: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --bundles nsis --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-native-bundles.cjs collect --platform win --arch x64 --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:win_nsis:arm64: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --bundles nsis --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-native-bundles.cjs collect --platform win --arch arm64 --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:win_zip:x64: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --no-bundle --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform win --arch x64 --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:win_zip:arm64: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --no-bundle --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform win --arch arm64 --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.package:tauri:mac_tgz: yarn tauri:renderer && tauri build --bundles app --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform mac --arch arm64 --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.package:tauri:linux_tgz:x64: yarn tauri:renderer && tauri build --no-bundle --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform linux --arch x64 --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.package:tauri:linux_tgz:arm64: yarn tauri:renderer && node support/tauri-build.cjs build --no-bundle --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu && node support/tauri-portable.cjs pack --platform linux --arch arm64 --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.postinstall: cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 yarn electron support/update-electron-vendors.mjs && node support/patch-node-modules.mjs
